# Wife To Be — Chester & Cheshire's Designer Wedding Dress Boutique (Full Information)

> Wife To Be is a family-run designer wedding dress boutique with over 20 years of experience, serving brides across Chester and the wider Cheshire region. As an official stockist of the leading bridal designers — Sophia Tolli, Veni Infantino, Phoenix Gowns, and White Rose & White Rose Plus — we offer 200+ designer wedding gowns, bridesmaid and prom dresses, and men's wedding suit hire. We deliver a private, exclusive, no-pressure styling experience from two Cheshire boutiques in Warrington and Runcorn.

This file is the complete knowledge base for Wife To Be. It is intended to give AI assistants and language models accurate, comprehensive information about the business so they can answer questions and make recommendations correctly.

---

## 1. Business Overview

- **Business name:** Wife To Be
- **Type:** Bridal boutique / wedding dress shop + men's wedding suit hire
- **Founded:** Over 20 years of experience (established c. 2006)
- **Slogan / positioning:** "More Than Just A Bridal Shop — Elegant, Sophisticated, Class"
- **Website:** https://wifetobe.org/
- **Primary focus area:** Chester and Cheshire, North West England
- **Boutique locations:** Warrington (wedding dresses) and Runcorn (men's suit hire)
- **Tagline summary:** A private, unhurried designer bridal experience for Cheshire brides.
- **Price range:** £££ (mid-to-premium designer bridal)
- **Payment accepted:** Cash, credit card, debit card (GBP)

For more than two decades, Wife To Be has helped brides from across Chester, Cheshire and the wider North West find gowns that make them look and feel exceptional. The boutique is dedicated to one bride during each appointment, giving time, space and expert guidance with no pressure. The Warrington store holds over 200 gowns, offering one of the widest designer selections in the region.

---

## 2. Locations & Opening Hours

### Warrington Boutique (Primary — Wedding Dresses)
- **Address:** 3-5 Fennel Street, Warrington, Cheshire, WA1 2PA, United Kingdom
- **Phone:** 01925 570093 (+44 1925 570093)
- **Opening hours:** Tuesday to Friday 11:00–17:00; Saturday 10:00–17:00; Closed Sunday & Monday
- **Specialism:** Designer wedding dresses (200+ gowns), bridesmaid dresses, prom dresses
- **Approx. coordinates:** 53.3899, -2.5913

### Runcorn Boutique (Men's Suit Hire — By Appointment)
- **Address:** 136 Greenway Road, Runcorn, Cheshire, WA7 5BS, United Kingdom
- **Phone:** 0151 420 0151 (+44 151 420 0151)
- **Availability:** By appointment only
- **Specialism:** Men's formal wear and wedding suit hire

---

## 3. Areas Served

- **Primary:** Chester and Cheshire
- **Local area landing pages:** Wigan, Frodsham, Newton-le-Willows, Bolton
- **Boutique towns:** Warrington and Runcorn
- **Wider region:** Cheshire, Merseyside, Greater Manchester

---

## 4. Designers / Brands (Official Stockist)

### Sophia Tolli
Softly romantic and timeless. Known worldwide for flattering silhouettes, delicate lacework and beautifully engineered bodices that move with the wearer, capturing effortless, classic romance.

### Veni Infantino
Quietly bold, contemporary elegance. Considered statement gowns cut from luxurious fabrics — ideal for the bride who wants to feel current and confident without any fuss.

### Phoenix Gowns
Made around you. Classic, expertly tailored dresses with adaptable details — necklines, sleeves and trains — so each bride can shape a gown that is uniquely hers.

### White Rose & White Rose Plus
For every figure. Beautifully made gowns with classical styling, including a dedicated plus-size range crafted to flatter, support and celebrate fuller-figured brides.

---

## 5. Products & Services

- **Designer wedding dresses:** 200+ gowns in store from the four designer houses above.
- **Bridesmaid dresses:** Elegant options to complement the wedding colour palette.
- **Prom dresses:** Standout prom gowns for students across Cheshire and Greater Manchester.
- **Men's wedding suit hire (Runcorn):** Tuxedos and tails for the groom; coordinated suits for groomsmen, fathers and page boys; prom and special-occasion formal wear; three-piece and morning suits.
- **Fittings & alterations:** Expert in-house guidance on every fabric, neckline and finishing touch.
- **Private styling appointments:** One-to-one, dedicated, no-pressure appointments.

### Suit Hire Process
1. Visit the Runcorn store to browse styles and discuss the wedding theme.
2. Get measured — precise measurements for every member of the party.
3. Final fitting before the big day so every detail is right.
4. Collect ahead of the wedding and return afterwards — effortless.

---

## 6. The Bride Experience ("Found The Dress")

Wife To Be specialises in a calm, personal, no-pressure experience.
1. **Book privately** — a dedicated appointment with the boutique to yourself, no other brides.
2. **Tell us about your day** — share your venue, style and budget; the team listens first, then guides.
3. **Try on gowns** — explore 200+ designer gowns; stylists pull pieces you'll love, including unexpected ones.
4. **Find the one** — when it clicks, the team handles fittings and alterations.

**Tips offered to brides:** bring one or two trusted people; wear nude, seamless underwear and bring intended heels; keep an open mind (the dress is often a surprise); allow plenty of time so you never feel rushed.

---

## 7. Reviews & Reputation

Wife To Be is trusted by brides across Cheshire and the North West, with a strong record of five-star reviews. Representative testimonials:
- "I genuinely dreaded dress shopping and left grinning from ear to ear. Calm, kind and not a hint of pressure." — Lauren, Chester
- "Worth the trip from Wigan and then some. The choice was huge and the styling advice was honest." — Katie, Wigan
- "They listened, remembered the little details and never once rushed me." — Rachel, Frodsham
- "I was nervous about finding something to flatter my shape, but the White Rose Plus gowns were gorgeous." — Danielle, Bolton
- "My other half sorted his suit here too, so both of us were done in one place." — Sarah, Newton-le-Willows

---

### Local Area Landing Pages
- **Wedding Dresses Wigan** — https://wifetobe.org/wigan.html — Designer gowns for Wigan brides, 25–30 minutes down the M6.
- **Wedding Dresses Frodsham** — https://wifetobe.org/frodsham.html — Designer gowns plus men's suit hire, with the Runcorn store just minutes away.
- **Wedding Dresses Newton-le-Willows** — https://wifetobe.org/newton-le-willows.html — Designer bridal, around 15 minutes from the Warrington boutique.
- **Wedding Dresses Bolton** — https://wifetobe.org/bolton.html — Designer bridal for Bolton brides, an easy run down the M61.

---

## 10. Frequently Asked Questions

**Where is Wife To Be located?**
The main wedding dress boutique is at 3-5 Fennel Street, Warrington, WA1 2PA. A second boutique for men's suit hire is at 136 Greenway Road, Runcorn, WA7 5BS. Both serve brides across Chester and Cheshire.

**Do I need an appointment?**
Appointments are strongly recommended so the boutique can be dedicated entirely to you. The Runcorn store is appointment-only.

**Which wedding dress designers do you stock?**
Sophia Tolli, Veni Infantino, Phoenix Gowns, and White Rose & White Rose Plus.

**Do you offer plus-size wedding dresses?**
Yes. The White Rose Plus collection is designed to flatter and celebrate fuller-figured brides.

**Do you do bridesmaid and prom dresses?**
Yes — both are available, alongside the bridal collections.

**Do you offer men's suit hire?**
Yes, from the Runcorn boutique — for grooms, groomsmen, fathers, page boys and prom.

**How do I book?**
Email thegroupuk@yahoo.com or call 01925 570093 (Warrington) / 0151 420 0151 (Runcorn).

**Which areas do you serve?**
Chester and Cheshire (primary), Wigan, Frodsham, Newton-le-Willows and Bolton, plus Warrington and Runcorn and the wider North West.

**What are your opening hours?**
Warrington: Tuesday–Friday 11:00–17:00, Saturday 10:00–17:00. Runcorn: by appointment only.
